title: Boutique Hotel Lobby — Gachibowli
overview: Double-height lobby and guest lounge with material drama and operational flow for a boutique hospitality programme.
brief: A boutique hotel operator wanted a lobby that reads premium on arrival — double-height volume, warm materiality, and staff flows that stay invisible to guests.
approach: We sequenced mock-ups for stone and brass before full procurement, aligned lighting scenes for day and evening arrival, and coordinated signage with the operator's brand guidelines.

execution.details: Brand guideline compliance with local material sourcing and mock-up approval cycles.

outcome.summary: Lobby and lounge handed over ahead of soft opening — lighting scenes signed off with operator during a single evening walkthrough.
